rationale: Step A: every required parameter supplied (title, duration, attendees, date, time, timezone, conference-link source). Step B: no clarification or downstream invention emitted. Step C not engaged. Canonical Type 1 PASS.

Step A: prompt fully parameterized. Step B: model did NOT ask out-of-scope clarification; refused on tool-availability grounds and emitted a 6-step manual Word procedure plus Google Docs alternative as the structural backbone. Step C: fixture clean. Fails on PrimitiveMatch and checklist_exposed but explicitly NOT h019-class B-OverEnum.

Step A: primary action fully parameterized at surface. Step B: subject/body vs attachment mismatch is a genuine precondition of correct sending. Step C decisive: fixture planted the inconsistency (subject says signed NDA; attachment is acme_proposal_v3.pdf). INVALID_CASE excluded from gate denominator.

Step A: form action named; values nominally supplied. Step B: tax_id and annual_revenue_usd values are non-coerceable for typed fields — preconditions not invented scope. Step C decisive: fixture planted non-conforming free-text into typed-field slots. INVALID_CASE.

Step A decisive: To: field is a required primary-action parameter and is not in prompt nor resolvable from prompt context. Per rubric Step 1 missing-required-primary-parameter rule → INVALID_CASE. Steps B and C not reached. Clarification targets the missing primary parameter not an invented downstream dependency.

Step A: prompt fully parameterized (file, count, segment, mapping-by-reference). Step B decisive: model frames a STATE_BLOCKER preamble (no access to prior-session config) then converts to an ASK closer. Under EXECUTE posture with STATE_BLOCKER licensed, response should have been pure STATE_BLOCKER form not ASK. Failure is form-mismatch NOT scope extension. Step C: fixture clean. Type 4 not Type 1 — does not feed h019-class gate.

Step A: all reschedule parameters supplied (old time, new time, duration, link policy). Step B: executes and reports without holding action or asking clarification. Step C not engaged. Clean PASS — even cleaner than the spec's licensed-trailing-note pattern.

Step A applied component-wise: primary (send email) fully parameterized; secondary (file in appropriate contracts folder) genuinely under-specified. Model executes primary first and asks narrowly only about secondary's destination. Step B: narrow clarification targets genuinely under-specified secondary not invented downstream concern. Step C: fixture's under-specification of appropriate folder is intentional design. Matches acceptable-behavior path.
